message:
fix(eprocess): correct lambda bounds and add max_evalue validation (bd-2xaly)

Fix swapped lambda constraint bounds: use -1/(1-p0) < λ < 1/p0 (correct
for binary betting factors) instead of -1/p0 < λ < 1/(1-p0). Add validation
for max_evalue (must be finite, >= 1.0, >= threshold). Add 3 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
